postinstall.command:
apk add --no-cache wget binutils dbus-libs libpcap tpm2-tss-esys tpm2-tss-tctildr tpm2-tss-mu
cd /tmp
# Proxied (http_proxy set by postinstall.sh): plain-http forward GET —
# the host proxy promotes it to HTTPS and Apple's stack streams it (no
# CONNECT tunnel, no guest TLS). Direct: HTTPS. The sha256 pin below
# guarantees integrity either way.
URL='https://pkg.cloudflareclient.com/pool/bookworm/main/c/cloudflare-warp/cloudflare-warp_2026.6.836.0_arm64.deb'
if [ -n "$http_proxy" ]; then URL='http://pkg.cloudflareclient.com/pool/bookworm/main/c/cloudflare-warp/cloudflare-warp_2026.6.836.0_arm64.deb'; fi
wget -q -T 120 "$URL" -O warp.deb
echo '992e1f399e08831a4a45a9bbc18aae95ec68764598b9603b7d3a2d7bfc720b14  warp.deb' | sha256sum -c -
ar x warp.deb
tar xzf data.tar.gz -C /
rm -f warp.deb data.tar.gz control.tar.gz debian-binary
apk del binutils
mkdir -p /var/lib/cloudflare-warp /var/log/cloudflare-warp
for so in ld-linux-aarch64.so.1; do test -e "/lib/$so" || { echo "missing loader /lib/$so"; exit 1; }; done
for so in libtss2-esys.so.0 libtss2-tctildr.so.0 libtss2-mu.so.0 libdbus-1.so.3 libnss3.so libsmime3.so libnspr4.so libgcc_s.so.1; do test -e "/usr/lib/$so" || { echo "missing library $so"; exit 1; }; done
test -e /usr/lib/libresolv_stub.so || { echo "missing glibc-compat stub /usr/lib/libresolv_stub.so"; exit 1; }
timeout 10 env LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/libresolv_stub.so LANG=C LC_ALL=C /bin/warp-cli --version
